"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sweeper_console.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sweeper_console.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sweeper_console.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sweeper_console.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o sweeper_console.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsweeper_console.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\sweeper_console.dir\linkLibs.rsp
